note: PLACEHOLDER — no real numbers captured yet. The CI guard SKIPS the comparison while placeholder=true. To populate: on a dev machine, build the app with `pnpm pack` (or `pnpm dist:<platform>`), then run `pnpm measure:ram -- --out .project/baselines/idle-ram-baseline.json --idle 60`, set placeholder=false, and commit the result. Real runtime RSS capture requires the actual Electron app running with a display, which may not be possible in every environment (see TIM-223 handback).
